scope: fixture synthesis constraint artifact for candidate boundary
requiredAssumptions: selected obstruction witnesses resolve in the current Feature Extension Report
candidate operations are interpreted inside the selected measurement universe
coverageAssumptions: static dependency and selected semantic diagram evidence are included
unsupported constructs are reported rather than discharged
exactnessAssumptions: constraint refs name the selected bounded synthesis package inputs
candidate refs name produced candidates, not solver completeness evidence
unsupportedConstructs: unbounded search spaces are outside synthesis artifact v0

constraints.predicate: candidate must route forbidden static edge through an allowed boundary
candidate must preserve selected coupon / discount observation contract

requiredAssumptions: interface contract covers both selected coupon paths
candidate operation refs resolve to the bounded operation package
coverageAssumptions: static and semantic evidence refs cover the selected constraints
runtime behavior is checked separately if runtime edges are present
exactnessAssumptions: selected observation equality assumptions are recorded
unsupported constructs are not silently discharged
unsupportedConstructs: global semantic completeness is outside this candidate
nonConclusions: produced candidate soundness is conditional on recorded assumptions

valid no-solution certificate is checked separately
